# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Use .NET 8/9 for all projects.
- Follow SOLID and Clean Architecture principles.
- Organize code by features and layers.
- Implement Dependency Injection (DI) for Supabase.
- Create a custom AuthenticationStateProvider.

## Asynchronous Programming
- Utilize async/await for all asynchronous operations.

## UI/UX Considerations
- Implement loading indicators and error handling in the UI.
- Suggest reusable components for better maintainability.

## Project-Specific Rules
- When responding, format the output with a list of files, include complete commented code, and provide a brief explanation.
